Off Calendar Jul-25-2016 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-29-2016 Continued To Jul-25-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Garcia for (petitioner) Amalia Carreno.

The Court stated that things are close and asked if there was any other witness who could file a declaration regarding the facts. Mr. Garcia stated that it was witnessed by two individuals but that he does not have a copy of the will with him. The Court stated that it needs a declaration from that person. Mr. Garcia confirmed that what is needed is a declaration regarding the level of awareness of the testator and that he will investigate with the other witness to the will. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was continued to July 25, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Boncato. (Not Reported)
